script: let getAudioPath=async(e,a,n,t)=>{var o=require("path"),r=require("fs"),i=(new Date).getTime()+".mp3";return r.existsSync(o.join(n,"tts"))?(r.writeFileSync(o.join(n,"tts",i),await getTTSAudio(e,a,t)),console.log("folder already exists")):(r.mkdirSync(o.join(n,"tts")),r.writeFileSync(o.join(n,"tts",i),await getTTSAudio(e,a,t)),console.log("folder created successfully")),o.join(n,"tts",i)},getTTSAudio=async(e,a,n)=>{let t=n.apiKey||"";var o=n.baseUrl||"https://api.openai.com";let r=n.model||"gpt-4o-mini-tts",i=n.voiceName||"coral",l=a?Math.min(4,Math.max(.25,a)):1,m=o+"/v1/audio/speech",s=require("axios");return new Promise((a,n)=>{s.post(m,{model:r,input:e,voice:i,speed:l,response_format:"mp3"},{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer "+t,"Content-Type":"application/json"},responseType:"arraybuffer"}).then(e=>{console.log(e),a(e.data)}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),n("")})})},getTTSVoice=async a=>Promise.resolve([{name:"alloy",gender:"neutral"},{name:"ash",gender:"neutral"},{name:"ballad",gender:"neutral"},{name:"coral",gender:"female"},{name:"echo",gender:"male"},{name:"fable",gender:"neutral"},{name:"nova",gender:"female"},{name:"onyx",gender:"male"},{name:"sage",gender:"neutral"},{name:"shimmer",gender:"female"},{name:"verse",gender:"neutral"},{name:"marin",gender:"female"},{name:"cedar",gender:"male"}].map(e=>({name:e.name,gender:e.gender,locale:"multilingual",displayName:"OpenAI TTS - "+e.name,plugin:"openai-tts-voice-plugin",config:{...a,voiceName:e.name}})));global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath,global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
